common.tagline: Ship from the US to Haiti — fast, safe, transparent.

hero.title: Your packages from the US to Haiti, simplified.
hero.subtitle: Get a free US address. Shop anywhere online. We handle the rest.

free.title: Free US Address
free.desc: Sign up and instantly receive a free Miami warehouse address.

transparent.title: Transparent Pricing
transparent.desc: Calculate shipping costs upfront with our calculator.

tracking.title: Real-time Tracking
tracking.desc: Follow every step from US warehouse to Haiti pickup.

s1.title: Sign up
s1.desc: Create a free account and receive your US address.

s2.title: Shop
s2.desc: Use your US address as the shipping address on any US store.

s3.title: We receive
s3.desc: We collect, weigh and prepare your packages in Miami.

s4.title: Pick up in Haiti
s4.desc: Pick up at our branches in Port-au-Prince, Cap-Haïtien or Les Cayes.

cta.title: Ready to ship smarter?
cta.subtitle: Sign up in 60 seconds and start receiving US packages in Haiti.

track.title: Track your package
track.subtitle: Enter your tracking code (PG-XXXXXX) or carrier number.

calculator.title: Shipping calculator
calculator.subtitle: Estimate the cost to ship from the US to Haiti.
calculator.dimsHelp: Dimensions are optional but used for air shipments to compute dimensional weight.

addresses.title: Your free US address
addresses.subtitle: Use this address as the shipping address on any US online store.
addresses.tip: Don't forget to include your customer code (e.g. ARI-001234) in the address — that's how we route your package to your account.
addresses.ctaSignup: Sign up to get your code

about.title: About PGFI Shipping
about.intro: PGFI Shipping helps the Haitian community in the US and abroad receive packages reliably in Haiti, with transparent pricing and real-time tracking.
about.mission: Make cross-border shipping affordable, predictable and respectful of our customers' time.
about.v2: Care for every package, every time.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: By using PGFI Shipping, you agree to these terms. We provide package forwarding from our US warehouses to delivery branches in Haiti.
terms.p2: You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide and for keeping your password safe.
terms.p3: Hazardous materials, weapons, drugs and other items prohibited by law cannot be shipped.
terms.p4: Prices are calculated based on weight (or dimensional weight, whichever is greater) and the service type. Taxes and fees may apply.
terms.p5: Our liability is limited to the declared value of the package, up to the maximum permitted by law.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: We collect only the data we need to operate the service: contact information, addresses, and shipment history.
privacy.p2: Account data (name, email, phone), shipment data (tracking, weight, contents declaration), and payment metadata (we never store full card numbers).
privacy.p3: To provide the service, communicate about your shipments, and improve our operations.
privacy.p4: You can export or delete your data from the dashboard or by contacting support.

support.title: Contact support
support.subtitle: We typically reply within one business day.
support.name: Your name
support.subject: Subject
support.sent: Thanks — your message has been sent.

wallet.depositInstructions: Follow the instructions to complete the payment. Your wallet will be credited once we confirm the transaction.
